comments.post_body:
Excited to share that I recently stepped into a new chapter as Director of Software & Data Engineering at NetApp Keystone.

After years in the consumer tech world, stepping into enterprise B2B storage has been a refreshing shift — new customers, new problems, and a massive opportunity to build for Keystone’s next phase of growth.

Grateful for the talented people I get to work with every day — and excited for what we’re building next.
comments.context_summary: The commenter is congratulating the author on their new role as Director of Software & Data Engineering at NetApp Keystone, a significant career shift from consumer tech to enterprise B2B storage. The author is excited about the new opportunities and grateful for their talented team.

comments.post_body:
Super happy to represent the cross-functional team at NetApp and receive the SE Labs 2025 Award for Data Protection!! 

This is the testament to all the hard work the team has been putting into by innovating and integrating AI-Powered ransomware detection capability directly into storage layer to ensure NetApp is and will be the Most Secure Storage on The Planet to protect your mission critical data at all times! 



https://lnkd.in/gPg7HQRV
https://lnkd.in/gGBBB7yH
comments.context_summary: The commenter is congratulating the cross-functional team at NetApp for receiving the SE Labs 2025 Award for Data Protection, which recognizes their innovative work in integrating AI-powered ransomware detection into storage layers. This achievement solidifies NetApp's position as a secure storage solution for mission-critical data.

comments.comment_body:
Shreyash Gupta I'd love to catch up one of these days, it's been too long! I'll message you and we can go from there.

We had a heck of a team at Infor, didn't we? I'm so glad that we were able to help you get to where you are now - and I feel the same way. I don't think I would be where I am today without learning every single day from you, Bill, Mesfin, Hung, Michelle and the rest of the great team that we rolled with.

comments.post_body:
I'm excited to share that I am starting in new role as Senior Manager Engineering at Elevance Health. I am grateful to my team members for their dedication in streamlining our digital workflows further, helping us better serve our members.
A sincere thanks to the leadership team Surajit Pal, Ph.D., Ajoy Ranga and others for their invaluable mentorship over the past six years and beyond. I look forward to supporting our teams further in this new role.
comments.context_summary: The commenter is congratulating the author on their new role as Senior Manager Engineering at Elevance Health and expressing gratitude for the support they've received from their team and leadership, including Surajit Pal and Ajoy Ranga. The commenter is responding to the author's announcement of their new role and thanking them for their dedication to streamlining digital workflows.

comments.post_body: What an awesome 1+ years it has been at Microsoft! On top of all the amazing projects I have lead and also be part of, the icing on the cake has been having the platform to contribute to 1 Patent, 2 journals and 1 presentation. Thank you to my managers Arun Gururajan, Ph.D. Christian Seifert, PhD for empowering me deliver at the highest scale and to all the great collaborators that I have been lucky to work with so far. Hope many more to follow! #microsoft #thankyou
comments.context_summary: The commenter is celebrating their 1+ year anniversary at Microsoft, highlighting their accomplishments and expressing gratitude to their managers and collaborators. They are responding to their own post, reflecting on their positive experience at the company.
